description: ANALYST proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED review of TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 smoke validation results. ANALYST requests AUDITOR review of smoke report artifact and ledger trail completeness to confirm autonomous loop integrity is verified and close TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 with VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED before advancing to next roadmap phase. Proof target is governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json on main branch at commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9 with all checks in pass state.
